narrative:
82 Ohio House district has 77,142 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -14.3% D−R vs -30.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
